school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.

Annex goes with Period 2 if and only if 84% does not go with Library.

Either Nash goes with Period 1 or Annex goes with Boyd.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
